title: Looking for a developer to create a custom chart view
excerpt:

posts.author: davidnairn (David Molesky)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking for someone that can create an app for a custom chart view based on my table data.

In my table each item has a timeline (start date and end date) and a revenue. I would like to graph the revenue, evenly divided across each month and totalled up for all projects.

Similar to this screenshot

Screen Shot 2021-11-09 at 2.21.29 PM1971×788 40.8 KB

The different colours are group of items in the Monday table.

The goal lines aren’t crucial but I would be open to ideas of how to implement.

The final result doesn’t need to be super flexible. It only needs to work with one table.

Would be happy to provide more information for anyone that’s interested.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @davidnairn

Sounds like an interesting project! I’d be happy to discuss this further with you and see what might be possible. CarbonWeb has been working with companies to perfect their monday.com environment and also develop custom apps. If you would like to schedule a consultation with my team please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Best of luck!
